mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM v_ideology_value WHERE id IN
#{item}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM v_ideology_value WHERE vname = #{vname} AND course_id = #{courseId}
SELECT id,vname,remark,course_id AS courseId,create_time AS createTime,update_time AS updateTime FROM v_ideology_value

SELECT id,vname,remark, course_id AS courseId, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM v_ideology_value
course_id = #{courseId}
AND vname LIKE CONCAT('%',#{vname},'%')
AND remark LIKE CONCAT('%',#{remark},'%')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cm_course WHERE id = #{courseId}
